args: apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends       build-essential g++ make cmake git curl ca-certificates xz-utils unzip jq zstd       python3 python-is-python3 autoconf automake libtool pkg-config       libicu-dev bison flex libxml2 opam       libncurses6 libcurl4 libsqlite3-0 libuuid1     && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash -     && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends nodejs && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
cd /tmp/e2e && npm ci && npx playwright install --with-deps chromium && rm -rf /tmp/e2e/node_modules
